summary: Workload-aware MariaDB tuning: table caches, join/sort buffers, InnoDB log buffer, buffer pool instances

changes.description: Config advisor now derives table_definition_cache, table_open_cache, join_buffer_size, sort_buffer_size, innodb_log_buffer_size, and innodb_buffer_pool_instances from live MariaDB status counters (mysqltuner-style). Includes diagnostic evidence and notes in config change payloads.

Baseline capture now reads the six new tunable variables from running containers and cloud-swarm defaults, ensuring the tuning service preserves existing values when no workload data triggers a change.

Database inspection now collects additional SHOW GLOBAL STATUS counters (Open_tables, Opened_tables, Table_open_cache_hits/misses, Select_full_join, Sort_merge_passes, Sort_rows, Innodb_log_waits, Created_tmp_disk/tables) and SHOW GLOBAL VARIABLES for the new tunable parameters.
